Name: product_name
Potential Data Quality Issues: Long strings, special characters, too much information

Name: category
Potential Data Quality Issues: Values are grouped using a pipe |

Name: discounted_price
Potential Data Quality Issues: Contains currency symbol and commas. Must be cleaned and converted to float.

Name: actual_price
Potential Data Quality Issues: Contains currency symbol and commas. Must be cleaned and converted to float.

Name: discount_percentage
Description (Semantic Meaning): Percentage of Discount for the Product

Name: rating_count
Description (Semantic Meaning): Number of people who voted for the Amazon rating

Name: about_product
Potential Data Quality Issues: Contains special characters and diferent formats of text

Name: user_id
Description (Semantic Meaning): ID of the user who wrote review for the Product

Name: user_name
Description (Semantic Meaning): Name of the user who wrote review for the Product

Name: product_link
Description (Semantic Meaning): Official Website Link of the Product
